subcodes.first_line: All that is in the heavens and on earth glorifieth God, and all are His worshippers. Every created thing doth sing His praise, yet mankind remaineth heedless [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبح لله ما فی السموات و الارض و کل له عابدون یسبح له کلشیء ولکن الناس هم
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @praise and encouragement, @proclamation to people of the Bayan, @words vs deeds, @methods of teaching the Cause, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @He Whom God Shall Make Manifest; the Bab and Baha'u'llah
